chorus-reviewer.description: Delegate code review to another CLI agent (Codex/Grok/Claude) via Chorus.

chorus-researcher.description: Delegate deep research with citations to another CLI agent (default Grok) via Chorus.

chorus-architect.description: Delegate architecture candidates to another CLI agent (default Codex) via Chorus.

chorus-devils-advocate.description: Delegate adversarial critique to another CLI agent (default Grok) via Chorus.
